title: kernel security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[6.12.0-55.38.1.0.1_0.OL10]
- nvme-pci: remove two deallocate zeroes quirks [Orabug: 37756650]
- Add new Oracle Linux Driver Signing (key 1) certificate [Orabug: 37985782]
- Disable UKI signing [Orabug: 36571828]
- Update Oracle Linux certificates (Kevin Lyons)
- Disable signing for aarch64 (Ilya Okomin)
- Oracle Linux RHCK Module Signing Key was added to the kernel trusted keys list (olkmod_signing_key.pem) [Orabug: 29539237]
- Update x509.genkey [Orabug: 24817676]
- Conflict with shim-ia32 and shim-x64 <= 15.3-1.0.5]
- Remove upstream reference during boot (Kevin Lyons) [Orabug: 34729535]
- Add Oracle Linux IMA certificates
- Update module name for cryptographic module [Orabug: 37400433]
full_text:
[6.12.0-55.38.1.0.1_0.OL10]
- nvme-pci: remove two deallocate zeroes quirks [Orabug: 37756650]
- Add new Oracle Linux Driver Signing (key 1) certificate [Orabug: 37985782]
- Disable UKI signing [Orabug: 36571828]
- Update Oracle Linux certificates (Kevin Lyons)
- Disable signing for aarch64 (Ilya Okomin)
- Oracle Linux RHCK Module Signing Key was added to the kernel trusted keys list (olkmod_signing_key.pem) [Orabug: 29539237]
- Update x509.genkey [Orabug: 24817676]
- Conflict with shim-ia32 and shim-x64 <= 15.3-1.0.5]
- Remove upstream reference during boot (Kevin Lyons) [Orabug: 34729535]
- Add Oracle Linux IMA certificates
- Update module name for cryptographic module [Orabug: 37400433]

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-17396.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-22026.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-38718.html
